personalInfo.name: Harsh Sureja
personalInfo.title: Senior Flutter Developer
personalInfo.bio: Results-driven Senior Flutter Developer with 4+ years of expertise in developing high-performance cross-platform mobile applications and Flutter web solutions. Specialized in Dart programming, Clean Architecture, Bloc/Cubit state management, and responsive UI/UX design. Successfully delivered 15+ production applications serving 75,000+ active users with 99.9% uptime.

responsibilities: Architected and developed mobile applications and Flutter web applications for farmer-facing solutions and B2B transactional systems, serving 10,000+ users across the Agri-Food Supply Chain ecosystem
Implemented Flutter Clean Architecture with Bloc state management, reducing code complexity by 35% and improving application performance by 45%
Led end-to-end product development for 5 major releases, collaborating with 8+ cross-functional team members including designers, backend engineers, and customer success teams
Mentored 3 junior Flutter developers through code reviews, pair programming, and technical documentation, increasing team productivity by 25%
Engineered responsive Flutter web applications with mobile-first design principles, achieving 99.9% cross-platform compatibility across devices
Applied product thinking methodologies to agricultural ecosystem challenges, driving 40% increase in farmer engagement and user retention rates
Optimized CI/CD pipelines for mobile app deployment, reducing release time from 4 hours to 30 minutes (87.5% improvement)
Developed advanced Flutter widgets including SliverPersistentHeader, CustomScrollView, and complex animations for enhanced UX
Developed and maintained 8+ enterprise-grade Flutter applications with complex UI components serving 50,000+ active users
Led Agile development team of 3 Flutter developers, conducting daily code reviews and enforcing Flutter best practices and coding standards
Implemented Bloc and Provider state management patterns, improving application performance and scalability by 40%
Integrated 15+ RESTful APIs and third-party services including payment gateways (Razorpay, Stripe), Firebase Cloud Messaging, and Google Analytics
Collaborated with UX/UI design teams to create pixel-perfect mobile interfaces following Material Design and Cupertino guidelines
Reduced application crash rates by 60% through implementation of comprehensive unit testing, widget testing, and error handling
Optimized Flutter build processes and app size, decreasing compilation time by 50% and reducing APK/IPA size by 30%
Designed and implemented responsive and adaptive UI components for 10+ mobile applications across Android and iOS platforms
Utilized Redux state management to streamline data flow, improving code maintainability by 30% and reducing state-related bugs
Developed custom implicit and explicit animations using Flutter's animation framework, enhancing user engagement by 25%
Participated in peer code reviews and contributed to establishing Flutter development standards and best practices
Implemented offline data persistence using SQLite and Hive databases, improving app performance for users with poor connectivity
Integrated Firebase services including Authentication, Cloud Firestore, Storage, and Cloud Functions for scalable backend solutions
Assisted in Flutter application development while learning industry best practices and mobile app development standards
Gained hands-on experience with Dart programming, Flutter framework, and complete mobile app development lifecycle
Participated in daily standups, sprint planning, and retrospective meetings following Scrum methodology
